name: player_pff_seasonlogs range year_offset: ranked AVG, meets_snap_minimum BOOL_OR, text latest-season (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with PFF 2024 (offense_ranked=10, meets_snap_minimum=false, unit=defense, position=CB) and 2025 (offense_ranked=30, meets_snap_minimum=true, unit=offense, position=S), then run the four columns with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. offense_ranked must AVG to 20 (not SUM to 40), meets_snap_minimum must BOOL_OR to true, and unit/position must render the latest in-window season (2025 -> offense / S). Proves the invalid-SQL (SUM of boolean/varchar) and silent-mis-aggregation (SUM of ranks) classes are both resolved.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(pff_player_seasonlogs.offense_ranked) FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pff_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND pff_player_seasonlogs.season_year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_offense_ranked_0", (SELECT BOOL_OR(pff_player_seasonlogs.meets_snap_minimum) FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pff_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND pff_player_seasonlogs.season_year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_meets_snap_minimum_0", (SELECT pff_player_seasonlogs.unit FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pff_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND pff_player_seasonlogs.season_year IN (2024,2025) ORDER BY pff_player_seasonlogs.season_year DESC LIMIT 1) AS "pff_unit_0", (SELECT pff_player_seasonlogs.position FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pff_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND pff_player_seasonlogs.season_year IN (2024,2025) ORDER BY pff_player_seasonlogs.season_year DESC LIMIT 1) AS "pff_position_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PFFX-000912', 'Test', 'Pffx', 'T.Pffx', 'Test Pffx', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO pff_player_seasonlogs (pid, season_year, offense_ranked, meets_snap_minimum, unit, "position") VALUES ('TEST-PFFX-000912', 2024, 10, false, 'defense', 'CB')
INSERT INTO pff_player_seasonlogs (pid, season_year, offense_ranked, meets_snap_minimum, unit, "position") VALUES ('TEST-PFFX-000912', 2025, 30, true, 'offense', 'S')
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(offense_ranked) AS pff_offense_ranked_0, BOOL_OR(meets_snap_minimum) AS pff_meets_snap_minimum_0, (array_agg(unit ORDER BY season_year DESC))[1] AS pff_unit_0, (array_agg("position" ORDER BY season_year DESC))[1] AS pff_position_0 FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pid = 'TEST-PFFX-000912' AND season_year IN (2024,2025)
